---
title: "多項式を非斉次項にもつ場合"
---

次の各小問において, 微分方程式
$$
P(D)y=f(x)
$$
の非斉次項 $f(x)$ の形に応じて, 特殊解を一つ求めよ. ただし, $D=\tfrac{d}{dx}$ とし, $P(\lambda)$ を多項式とする.

## (1) 定数項：$0$ を特性根に持たない場合

<div class="practice-box">
<div id="constant-nonzero-problem"></div>
<div class="problem-button-row">
  <button type="button" class="problem-button" onclick="generateConstantNonzero()">問題を変更</button>
</div>
<details>
<summary>解答と解説</summary>

<div id="constant-nonzero-answer"></div>

</details>
</div>

## (2) 定数項：$0$ を特性根に持つ場合

<div class="practice-box">
<div id="constant-zero-problem"></div>
<div class="problem-button-row">
  <button type="button" class="problem-button" onclick="generateConstantZero()">問題を変更</button>
</div>
<details>
<summary>解答と解説</summary>

<div id="constant-zero-answer"></div>

</details>
</div>

## (3) $x^m$：$0$ を特性根に持たない場合

<div class="practice-box">
<div id="monomial-nonzero-problem"></div>
<div class="problem-button-row">
  <button type="button" class="problem-button" onclick="generateMonomialNonzero()">問題を変更</button>
</div>
<details>
<summary>解答と解説</summary>

<div id="monomial-nonzero-answer"></div>

</details>
</div>

## (4) $x^m$：$0$ を特性根に持つ場合

<div class="practice-box">
<div id="monomial-zero-problem"></div>
<div class="problem-button-row">
  <button type="button" class="problem-button" onclick="generateMonomialZero()">問題を変更</button>
</div>
<details>
<summary>解答と解説</summary>

<div id="monomial-zero-answer"></div>

</details>
</div>

## (5) 一般の多項式：$0$ を特性根に持たない場合

<div class="practice-box">
<div id="polynomial-nonzero-problem"></div>
<div class="problem-button-row">
  <button type="button" class="problem-button" onclick="generatePolynomialNonzero()">問題を変更</button>
</div>
<details>
<summary>解答と解説</summary>

<div id="polynomial-nonzero-answer"></div>

</details>
</div>

## (6) 一般の多項式：$0$ を特性根に持つ場合

<div class="practice-box">
<div id="polynomial-zero-problem"></div>
<div class="problem-button-row">
  <button type="button" class="problem-button" onclick="generatePolynomialZero()">問題を変更</button>
</div>
<details>
<summary>解答と解説</summary>

<div id="polynomial-zero-answer"></div>

</details>
</div>

<script>
function randInt(min, max) {
  return Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1)) + min;
}

function range(min, max) {
  const out = [];
  for (let i = min; i <= max; i++) out.push(i);
  return out;
}

function nonzeroRand(min, max) {
  let n = 0;
  while (n === 0) n = randInt(min, max);
  return n;
}

function gcd(a, b) {
  a = Math.abs(a);
  b = Math.abs(b);
  while (b !== 0) {
    const t = a % b;
    a = b;
    b = t;
  }
  return a || 1;
}

class Fr {
  constructor(num, den = 1) {
    if (den === 0) throw new Error("zero denominator");
    if (den < 0) {
      num = -num;
      den = -den;
    }
    const g = gcd(num, den);
    this.n = num / g;
    this.d = den / g;
  }
  add(other) { return new Fr(this.n * other.d + other.n * this.d, this.d * other.d); }
  sub(other) { return new Fr(this.n * other.d - other.n * this.d, this.d * other.d); }
  mul(other) { return new Fr(this.n * other.n, this.d * other.d); }
  div(other) { return new Fr(this.n * other.d, this.d * other.n); }
  neg() { return new Fr(-this.n, this.d); }
  isZero() { return this.n === 0; }
  abs() { return new Fr(Math.abs(this.n), this.d); }
}

function fact(n) {
  let out = 1;
  for (let i = 2; i <= n; i++) out *= i;
  return out;
}

function fracToTex(fr) {
  if (fr.d === 1) return String(fr.n);
  if (fr.n < 0) return `-\\frac{${-fr.n}}{${fr.d}}`;
  return `\\frac{${fr.n}}{${fr.d}}`;
}

function fracAbsToTex(fr) {
  const a = fr.abs();
  if (a.d === 1) return String(a.n);
  return `\\frac{${a.n}}{${a.d}}`;
}

function monomialTex(power) {
  if (power === 0) return "1";
  if (power === 1) return "x";
  return `x^${power}`;
}

function dPowerTex(power) {
  if (power === 1) return "D";
  return `D^${power}`;
}

function dInverseTex(power) {
  if (power === 1) return "D^{-1}";
  return `D^{-${power}}`;
}

function coeffPowerTerm(coeff, variable, power) {
  if (coeff === 0) return "";
  const absCoeff = Math.abs(coeff);
  let body = "";
  if (power === 0) {
    body = String(absCoeff);
  } else {
    const v = power === 1 ? variable : `${variable}^${power}`;
    body = absCoeff === 1 ? v : `${absCoeff}${v}`;
  }
  return coeff < 0 ? `-${body}` : body;
}

function signedJoin(terms) {
  const nonempty = terms.filter(t => t !== "");
  if (nonempty.length === 0) return "0";
  let out = nonempty[0];
  for (let i = 1; i < nonempty.length; i++) {
    if (nonempty[i].startsWith("-")) out += nonempty[i];
    else out += "+" + nonempty[i];
  }
  return out;
}

function operatorTex(coeffs) {
  const terms = coeffs.map((c, i) => coeffPowerTerm(c, "D", i));
  return signedJoin(terms);
}

function lambdaPolynomialTex(coeffs) {
  const terms = coeffs.map((c, i) => coeffPowerTerm(c, "\\lambda", i));
  return signedJoin(terms);
}

function polynomialTex(coeffs) {
  const terms = coeffs.map((c, i) => coeffPowerTerm(c, "x", i));
  return signedJoin(terms);
}

function polynomialFromFractionsTex(coeffs) {
  const terms = [];
  for (let i = coeffs.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const c = coeffs[i];
    if (c.isZero()) continue;
    const abs = fracAbsToTex(c);
    let body = "";
    if (i === 0) {
      body = abs;
    } else {
      const xpart = i === 1 ? "x" : `x^${i}`;
      body = abs === "1" ? xpart : `${abs}${xpart}`;
    }
    terms.push((c.n < 0 ? "-" : "") + body);
  }
  return signedJoin(terms);
}

function randomOperatorCoeffs(deg, nonzeroConstant = true) {
  const coeffs = [];
  for (let i = 0; i <= deg; i++) {
    if (i === 0 && nonzeroConstant) coeffs.push(nonzeroRand(-4, 4));
    else if (i === deg) coeffs.push(nonzeroRand(-3, 3));
    else coeffs.push(randInt(-3, 3));
  }
  return coeffs;
}

function randomPolynomialCoeffs(deg) {
  const coeffs = [];
  for (let i = 0; i <= deg; i++) {
    if (i === deg) coeffs.push(nonzeroRand(-3, 3));
    else coeffs.push(randInt(-3, 3));
  }
  return coeffs;
}

function inverseSeries(coeffs, maxDegree) {
  const c = coeffs.map(v => new Fr(v));
  const b = [new Fr(1).div(c[0])];
  for (let n = 1; n <= maxDegree; n++) {
    let sum = new Fr(0);
    for (let k = 1; k <= Math.min(n, coeffs.length - 1); k++) {
      sum = sum.add(c[k].mul(b[n - k]));
    }
    b[n] = sum.neg().div(c[0]);
  }
  return b;
}

function derivativePolynomial(poly, k) {
  let current = poly.map(v => v instanceof Fr ? v : new Fr(v));
  for (let t = 0; t < k; t++) {
    const next = [];
    for (let i = 1; i < current.length; i++) {
      next.push(current[i].mul(new Fr(i)));
    }
    current = next.length === 0 ? [new Fr(0)] : next;
  }
  return current;
}

function addPoly(a, b) {
  const n = Math.max(a.length, b.length);
  const out = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
    out[i] = (a[i] || new Fr(0)).add(b[i] || new Fr(0));
  }
  return trimPoly(out);
}

function scalePoly(a, scalar) {
  return trimPoly(a.map(v => v.mul(scalar)));
}

function trimPoly(poly) {
  const out = poly.slice();
  while (out.length > 1 && out[out.length - 1].isZero()) out.pop();
  return out;
}

function applyInverseOperator(coeffs, poly) {
  const degree = poly.length - 1;
  const inv = inverseSeries(coeffs, degree);
  let out = [new Fr(0)];
  for (let k = 0; k <= degree; k++) {
    const deriv = derivativePolynomial(poly, k);
    out = addPoly(out, scalePoly(deriv, inv[k]));
  }
  return trimPoly(out);
}

function integratePoly(poly, r) {
  let out = poly.map(v => v instanceof Fr ? v : new Fr(v));
  for (let t = 0; t < r; t++) {
    const next = [new Fr(0)];
    for (let i = 0; i < out.length; i++) {
      next[i + 1] = out[i].div(new Fr(i + 1));
    }
    out = next;
  }
  return trimPoly(out);
}

function setMath(id, tex) {
  const element = document.getElementById(id);
  element.innerHTML = "";

  if (window.MathJax && window.MathJax.typesetPromise) {
    element.innerHTML = `\\[${tex}\\]`;
    window.MathJax.typesetPromise([element]);
  } else if (window.katex) {
    window.katex.render(tex, element, {
      displayMode: true,
      throwOnError: false
    });
  } else {
    element.textContent = tex;
  }
}

function answerTex(lines) {
  return `\\begin{aligned}${lines.join("\\\\")}\\end{aligned}`;
}

function generateConstantNonzero() {
  const deg = randInt(3, 5);
  const coeffs = randomOperatorCoeffs(deg, true);
  const p0 = coeffs[0];
  setMath("constant-nonzero-problem", `\\left(${operatorTex(coeffs)}\\right)y=1`);
  setMath("constant-nonzero-answer", answerTex([
    `P(0)=${p0}`,
    `y_p=${fracToTex(new Fr(1, p0))}`
  ]));
}

function generateConstantZero() {
  const r = randInt(1, 3);
  const minQDeg = Math.max(1, 3 - r);
  const maxQDeg = Math.min(3, 6 - r);
  const qdeg = randInt(minQDeg, maxQDeg);
  const q = randomOperatorCoeffs(qdeg, true);
  const q0 = q[0];
  const ypCoeff = new Fr(1, fact(r) * q0);
  const yp = new Array(r + 1).fill(null).map(() => new Fr(0));
  yp[r] = ypCoeff;
  setMath("constant-zero-problem", `\\left(${operatorTex(q)}\\right)${dPowerTex(r)}y=1`);
  setMath("constant-zero-answer", answerTex([
    `u=${dPowerTex(r)}y\,\quad \\left(${operatorTex(q)}\\right)u=1`,
    `u=${fracToTex(new Fr(1, q0))}`,
    `y_p=${polynomialFromFractionsTex(yp)}`
  ]));
}

function generateMonomialNonzero() {
  const m = randInt(1, 4);
  const deg = randInt(1, 3);
  const p = randomOperatorCoeffs(deg, true);
  const rhs = new Array(m + 1).fill(0).map((_, i) => i === m ? 1 : 0);
  const yp = applyInverseOperator(p, rhs);
  setMath("monomial-nonzero-problem", `\\left(${operatorTex(p)}\\right)y=${monomialTex(m)}`);
  setMath("monomial-nonzero-answer", answerTex([
    `y_p=\\frac{1}{${operatorTex(p)}}${monomialTex(m)}`,
    `y_p=${polynomialFromFractionsTex(yp)}`
  ]));
}

function generateMonomialZero() {
  const r = randInt(1, 3);
  const mChoices = range(1, 3).filter(m => r + m <= 4);
  const m = mChoices[randInt(0, mChoices.length - 1)];
  const qdeg = randInt(1, 2);
  const q = randomOperatorCoeffs(qdeg, true);
  const rhs = new Array(m + 1).fill(0).map((_, i) => i === m ? 1 : 0);
  const u = applyInverseOperator(q, rhs);
  const yp = integratePoly(u, r);
  setMath("monomial-zero-problem", `\\left(${operatorTex(q)}\\right)${dPowerTex(r)}y=${monomialTex(m)}`);
  setMath("monomial-zero-answer", answerTex([
    `u=${dPowerTex(r)}y\,\quad \\left(${operatorTex(q)}\\right)u=${monomialTex(m)}`,
    `u=${polynomialFromFractionsTex(u)}`,
    `y_p=${dInverseTex(r)}u=${polynomialFromFractionsTex(yp)}`
  ]));
}

function generatePolynomialNonzero() {
  const pdeg = randInt(1, 3);
  const rhs = randomPolynomialCoeffs(pdeg);
  const deg = randInt(1, 3);
  const p = randomOperatorCoeffs(deg, true);
  const yp = applyInverseOperator(p, rhs);
  setMath("polynomial-nonzero-problem", `\\left(${operatorTex(p)}\\right)y=${polynomialTex(rhs)}`);
  setMath("polynomial-nonzero-answer", answerTex([
    `y_p=\\frac{1}{${operatorTex(p)}}\\left(${polynomialTex(rhs)}\\right)`,
    `y_p=${polynomialFromFractionsTex(yp)}`
  ]));
}

function generatePolynomialZero() {
  const r = randInt(1, 2);
  const pdeg = randInt(1, 2);
  const rhs = randomPolynomialCoeffs(pdeg);
  const qdeg = randInt(1, 2);
  const q = randomOperatorCoeffs(qdeg, true);
  const u = applyInverseOperator(q, rhs);
  const yp = integratePoly(u, r);
  setMath("polynomial-zero-problem", `\\left(${operatorTex(q)}\\right)${dPowerTex(r)}y=${polynomialTex(rhs)}`);
  setMath("polynomial-zero-answer", answerTex([
    `u=${dPowerTex(r)}y\,\quad \\left(${operatorTex(q)}\\right)u=${polynomialTex(rhs)}`,
    `u=${polynomialFromFractionsTex(u)}`,
    `y_p=${dInverseTex(r)}u=${polynomialFromFractionsTex(yp)}`
  ]));
}

window.addEventListener("load", function() {
  generateConstantNonzero();
  generateConstantZero();
  generateMonomialNonzero();
  generateMonomialZero();
  generatePolynomialNonzero();
  generatePolynomialZero();
});
</script>
